race.description: Gloucester District Vets Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: CITY GOLD SPEED (5) drew a wide gate and didn't really get involved last start over 1200m at Tamworth. Backs up just six days later in a modest affair and jumps from a far better alley this time. Looks a great chance to turn his form around. MOSGIEL DAISY (2) settled a long way back and lost touch with the leading division in heavy going over 1400m here nine days ago. Boasts four wins and two placings from 13 runs here at or around this trip. In the right race to bounce back to form. Last start maiden winner MISS BUGATTI (6) is in the mix despite the class rise. Raced a lot closer to the pace than usual last time which may be the key. NIKODY'S BINKS (12) led all the way to score convincingly over 1400m at this track last start. That run followed a six-week let-up so there should be improvement to come. GOLDEN GALAXY (10) returned to form last start and is worth an each-way ticket at double-figure odds.
